# Vinod Kumar — Full Stack Developer

> Full Stack Developer based in Chennai, India with 2+ years of production experience. Specializes in end-to-end ownership across React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, MongoDB, and Apache Kafka. Built healthcare SaaS platforms, event-driven microservices, multilingual CRM systems, and multi-tenant MVPs for startups, agencies, SMBs, and international clients. Available for full-time roles in Chennai, Bengaluru, and remote — and freelance projects globally.

## Identity
- Name: Vinod Kumar (also known as Vinod Kumar Manimaran)
- Role: Full Stack Developer
- Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India
- Email: vk5241415@gmail.com
- Portfolio: https://vinod-dev.vercel.app
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vinod-manimaran/
- Experience: 2+ years shipping production systems solo and in teams
- Education: Bachelor of Computer Science, Hindustan College of Arts and Science, Chennai (2019–2023)

## Core Expertise
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Redux Toolkit, RTK Query
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST API design, WebSockets
- Databases: MongoDB, Redis
- Event-driven: Apache Kafka, microservices architecture, distributed systems
- Auth: OAuth, Passport.js, JWT, RBAC, multi-tenant isolation
- Cloud: AWS EC2, AWS S3, AWS EKS, Vercel, Docker
- Integrations: Zoho CRM API, Canva API, QR Code systems, i18n, RTL CSS
- Performance: Code splitting, lazy loading, server-side pagination, image compression

## Differentiator
End-to-end ownership — Vinod Kumar takes full responsibility from architecture decisions to production deployment. Not just frontend or backend — the entire system. Has shipped solo projects and collaborated in 4-5 person teams at Tensys Innovations and Primates.

## Work History
- Full Stack Developer at Tensys Innovations, Chennai (Sep 2024 – Oct 2025): Built healthcare SaaS platforms managing 5+ hospitals and 100+ daily users. Achieved 73% load time improvement (3s → 800ms), 90+ Lighthouse score, pixel-perfect Figma delivery, Page 1 SEO rankings.
- MERN Stack Developer at Primates, Chennai (Nov 2023 – Aug 2024): Built 5+ production healthcare websites with JWT + RBAC security serving 500+ users. 50% faster deployment cycles using reusable template architecture.

## Availability
- Full-time roles: Chennai, Bengaluru, Remote (India-wide and remote globally)
- Freelance projects: Worldwide — startups, agencies, SMBs, international clients
- Response time: Within 24 hours
- Contact: vk5241415@gmail.com

## Projects — Freelance

### PlusUAE — Multilingual Landing Page
- URL: https://vinod-dev.vercel.app/work/plusuae
- Live: https://www.plusuae.ae
- Client: UAE corporate client
- Delivered: 1 week turnaround (Nov 2025)
- Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zoho CRM API, Custom i18n
- What: 5-language landing page (Arabic, English, French, Chinese, Mandarin) with RTL-first CSS, auto language detection, and real-time Zoho CRM lead capture
- Impact: Zero lost leads, 100% CRM sync, supports Arabic RTL layout seamlessly

### Jignu — Multi-tenant Business Directory MVP
- URL: https://vinod-dev.vercel.app/work/jignu
- Client: Freelance
- Delivered: 1.5 months (Nov 2025)
- Stack: React, TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, JWT, AWS EC2
- What: JustDial-style business directory platform with 3 interfaces (Company Dashboard, Admin Dashboard, Public Website), multi-tenant isolation, tenant-scoped queries
- Impact: Production-grade MVP shipped in 1.5 months without cutting corners on security

### Wyka — Marketing Automation Platform
- URL: https://vinod-dev.vercel.app/work/wyka
- Client: Freelance
- Delivered: Dec 2025 – Feb 2026
- Stack: Next.js, Node.js, MongoDB, OAuth, Passport.js, Canva API, WebSockets
- What: Custom Canva marketplace integration with cross-platform OAuth session management and real-time WebSocket data sync for marketing agents
- Impact: Eliminated manual data re-entry between dashboard and Canva, real-time sync under 100ms

## Projects — Personal

### ClapOS — Film Production SaaS
- URL: https://vinod-dev.vercel.app/work/clapos
- Demo: https://clapstudio.vercel.app
- Built: Nov 2025 – Present
- Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Apache Kafka, MongoDB, AWS EKS, AWS S3, Cloudinary
- What: Event-driven microservices platform for film production with 10+ independent services. Vendor booking, talent scheduling, location coordination, equipment allocation — all synchronized via Kafka event bus
- Architecture: Frontend (Vercel) → API Gateway → 10+ Microservices → Kafka Event Bus → MongoDB (per-service instances)
- Impact: Zero direct service coupling, zero data loss during service outages, frontend production-ready

## Projects — Professional (Tensys Innovations)

### Hospital Management SaaS
- URL: https://vinod-dev.vercel.app/work/hospital-management-saas
- Built: Sep 2024 – Oct 2025 (13 months, 4-person team)
- Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Redux Toolkit, RTK Query, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS EC2, Redis
- What: Full-stack healthcare SaaS for 5+ hospitals — appointment management, patient history, invoices, doctor dashboards, SEO-driven patient acquisition
- Impact: 73% faster load times (3s → 800ms), 90+ Lighthouse score, Page 1 Google rankings, 100+ daily active users across 5 hospitals

### Medtech Dashboards
- URL: https://vinod-dev.vercel.app/work/medtech-dashboards
- Built: Sep 2024 – Oct 2025 (5-person team)
- Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Node.js, MongoDB, Redis, AWS EC2
- What: Multi-workflow appointment dashboard managing 5+ specialist types (doctors, home visits, labs, nurses, physiotherapy) with image compression, server-side pagination, and indexed queries
- Impact: 90% image size reduction, sub-100ms filter performance, handles 100k+ records

### PG Accommodation Platform
- URL: https://vinod-dev.vercel.app/work/pg-accommodation-platform
- Built: Sep 2024 – Oct 2025 (5-person team)
- Stack: Next.js, React Router DOM, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, React PDF, JWT, MongoDB
- What: Component-driven property management platform for landlords and tenants — online applications, invoice generation, notice tracking, unified tenant management
- Impact: 75%+ component reuse, 65% faster load times, mobile-first across all devices

## Projects — Professional (Primates)

### Hospital Websites Series
- URL: https://vinod-dev.vercel.app/work/hospital-websites-series
- Built: Nov 2023 – Aug 2024 (9 months, 3-person team)
- Stack: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, MongoDB, JWT, RBAC, AWS EC2, Docker
- What: 5+ production healthcare websites with patient portals, doctor dashboards, lab services — built on reusable base template with client-specific configuration
- Impact: 5 hospitals live, 50% faster deployment per client, 500+ active users, zero unauthorized access incidents

### Leads Management Dashboard
- URL: https://vinod-dev.vercel.app/work/leads-management-dashboard
- Built: Nov 2023 – Aug 2024 (2-person team)
- Stack: React, Node.js, MongoDB, QR Code generation
- What: QR-based insurance lead capture MVP with 3 interfaces — agent onboarding, leads dashboard, public landing page. Agents scan QR codes to capture leads in the field, admin tracks agent performance
- Impact: Zero manual paper forms, zero misattribution, real-time agent tracking
